query: SELECT l.id, l.name FROM livers l WHERE l.name LIKE '%Ryu kyogoku%'; SELECT COUNT(*) as stream_count, bl.streamerName FROM brand_livestreams bl WHERE bl.streamerName LIKE '%Ryu kyogoku%' GROUP BY bl.streamerName; SELECT COUNT(*) as stream_count_by_id FROM brand_livestreams bl WHERE bl.liverId = (SELECT id FROM livers WHERE name LIKE '%Ryu kyogoku%' LIMIT 1);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT l.id, l.name FROM livers l WHERE l.name LIKE '%Ryu kyogoku%'; SELECT COUNT(*) as stream_count, bl.streamerName FROM brand_livestreams bl WHERE bl.streamerName LIKE '%Ryu kyogoku%' GROUP BY bl.streamerName; SELECT COUNT(*) as stream_count_by_id FROM brand_livestreams bl WHERE bl.liverId = (SELECT id FROM livers WHERE name LIKE '%Ryu kyogoku%' LIMIT 1);
